plans.title: Intake Contract
plans.description: Define the guided intake data contract and state machine.

tasks.title: T001 Define guided intake draft state model
tasks.description: Add collecting, review, confirmed, build, and blocked states.

tasks.title: T002 Define structured question and option models
tasks.description: Define question and option payloads for backend and frontend.

tasks.title: T003 Define answer source, confidence, assumptions, and missing-field model
tasks.description: Track provenance and readiness for each answer.

plans.title: Backend Draft Persistence
plans.description: Persist and expose guided intake state safely.

tasks.title: T004 Extend draft persistence for intake state without breaking existing drafts
tasks.description: Add durable intake fields with backward-compatible defaults.

tasks.title: T005 Add API schema coverage for questions, answers, contract preview, and readiness
tasks.description: Expose typed schemas for the guided intake payloads.

tasks.title: T006 Add endpoint or endpoint extension to get current intake state
tasks.description: Allow frontend to load the current guided state.

tasks.title: T007 Add endpoint or endpoint extension to answer/update a question
tasks.description: Persist option selections and free-text answers.

tasks.title: T008 Add endpoint or endpoint extension to generate contract preview
tasks.description: Return the preview of decisions and blockers.

tasks.title: T009 Add endpoint or endpoint extension to confirm contract
tasks.description: Move a ready draft to confirmed state.

plans.title: Intake Engine
plans.description: Generate missing questions, recommendations, and blockers.

tasks.title: T011 Build intake engine for required topic detection
tasks.description: Compute missing fields from draft, manifest, assets, and defaults.

tasks.title: T012 Build recommended-option generation from defaults, context, assets, and prior answers
tasks.description: Generate useful options with one recommended answer when possible.

tasks.title: T013 Track release/web-preview/installable-app blockers separately from local planning
tasks.description: Keep external blockers visible without blocking local intake.

tasks.title: T014 Preserve and expose asset role decisions through intake
tasks.description: Keep logo, app icon, exact asset, and visual reference decisions stable.

plans.title: Frontend Chat Experience
plans.description: Render guided intake inside the existing chat-first New Project flow.

tasks.title: T015 Update New Project button flow to enter or reopen guided intake
tasks.description: Reuse the existing entry and avoid duplicate drafts.

tasks.title: T016 Render question cards with recommended options in chat
tasks.description: Show focused questions and selectable options in the timeline.

tasks.title: T017 Support free-text answers and option taps
tasks.description: Let the user answer naturally or by selecting options.

tasks.title: T018 Render contract preview with decisions, defaults, assumptions, assets, and blockers
tasks.description: Show the contract before confirmation.

tasks.title: T019 Render confirm/build actions only when valid
tasks.description: Show build actions only after the contract is ready and confirmed.

tasks.title: T020 Render changes-requested and blocked states with next steps
tasks.description: Guide the user back to focused questions or external setup.

tasks.title: T021 Add contextual command hooks if slash command palette exists
tasks.description: Register project commands without requiring the palette for first delivery.

plans.title: Build Gate Integration
plans.description: Connect confirmed drafts to the existing generation workflow.

tasks.title: T010 Gate generate/build so only confirmed drafts can start generator/reviewer
tasks.description: Prevent premature build execution and route confirmed drafts to the existing runner.

plans.title: Validation
plans.description: Cover backend, frontend, and Project Factory regression behavior.

tasks.title: T022 Add backend tests for state transitions and persistence
tasks.description: Cover guided intake draft state transitions.

tasks.title: T023 Add backend tests for blocked/confirmed build gate behavior
tasks.description: Ensure build cannot start before confirmation.

tasks.title: T024 Add Flutter tests for models, API, question UI, preview UI, and build gating
tasks.description: Cover mobile guided intake behavior.

tasks.title: T025 Run Project Factory regression tests
tasks.description: Verify existing factory flows still pass.

tasks.title: T026 Run mobile analyze/tests and publish Android release if frontend code ships
tasks.description: Validate and release user-visible frontend changes.
